rules.description: Migrate to general-purpose v2 storage account or specialized alternatives based on workload requirements, such as BlockBlobStorage or FileStorage.

rules.description: Upgrade TLS to latest version. Support for TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 in Azure storage accounts is ending.
